name: Chicken Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy oven-proof skillet, heat the olive oil until hot and almost smoking.
2. Add the chicken breasts and cook on medium-high heat until lightly browned on one side for about 3 minutes.
3. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
4. Turn the chicken over and cook the second side for 1 minute.
5. Remove the chicken breasts from the skillet and let them cool slightly.
6. Slice the chicken into a fan shape.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet, pour over the marinara sauce, and sprinkle with crumbled dried oregano.
8. Place the mozzarella slices on top of the chicken.
9. Turn on the broiler and adjust the rack to 6 inches from the heat source.
10. Under the broiler, cook until the cheese is hot and bubbling.
11. Serve immediately with boiled orzo pasta.
